biological_rationale: Repress BRD4 in LUAD: warhead binds BRD4 TF/enzymatic pocket; linker bridges to HDAC1 recruiter for epigenetic silencing at BRD4 target loci.
Repress WWTR1 in LUAD: warhead binds WWTR1 TF/enzymatic pocket; linker bridges to EZH2 recruiter for epigenetic silencing at WWTR1 target loci.
Repress YAP1 in LUAD: warhead binds YAP1 TF/enzymatic pocket; linker bridges to EZH2 recruiter for epigenetic silencing at YAP1 target loci.
Repress EZH2 in LUAD: warhead binds EZH2 TF/enzymatic pocket; linker bridges to HDAC1 recruiter for epigenetic silencing at EZH2 target loci.
Activate FOXA2 in LUAD AT2 redifferentiation: warhead tethers to FOXA2 promoter region; p300 recruiter deposits H3K27ac to reopen AT2 gene loci silenced by EZH2/HDAC1.
